summary: All four requirements are fully implemented in the diff. REQ-1: SiteHeader.tsx adds all six nav links (About Us, Our Banquet, Specialist, Decor, Event, Seminar & Conference) with smooth-scroll in both desktop and mobile menus. REQ-2: Five new section components are created with correct id anchors and rendered in App.tsx in logical order. REQ-3: brand.ts exports whatsappSecondary: '9794416439', and both ContactBookingSection and SiteFooter display both numbers as wa.me links. REQ-4: brand.ts address is updated to the full venue address and used in both display locations.
